name: The Comet Observatory
description:
The first of many “area-specific RPGs” I will likely make. To explain it a little bit, I like to make RPG bots based on a specific area that features multiple characters or a place that can house multiple characters. And the first stop on my list is a childhood classic, the Comet Observatory.

This will mainly feature Rosalina and the Lumas, but you can drag other characters into it if you wish.
creator: SacredSean
